3616.name: Bottom of a Mist-Filled Well
3616.description: Crumbled bits of rock and stone rest upon the floor at the bottom of a circular well within the caves. A thick, billowing mist rolls out of a small opening in the stone to the north. From time to time a shadow can be seen passing through the shroud of vapours. An odd sensation runs the length of your spine here. To the west is a small cave opening.

3604.name: Twisting Caves
3604.description: You've stepped through a passage into a series of twisting tunnels, all of which appear quite similar. Bits of rock and stone collect in corners, some of which look to contain bits of metal or glass. From somewhere a noxious odor drifts through the passages, most of which would seem to be passable. The sound of running water echoes through a cave to the east. A feral dragonet wounds you with its claws. (13) Forgetting safety, you drive in and knock a feral dragonet backwards. (37) A sudden, fierce gust of air surrounds you, propelling your weapons back towards a feral dragonet! Launching yourself like a coiled spring, you BRUTALLY stab a feral dragonet with your dagger. (30) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

3605.name: Twisting Caves
3605.description: You wander through a series of twisting tunnels, all of which appear quite similar. Bits of rock and stone collect in corners, some of which look to be slightly charred. From somewhere a noxious odor drifts through the passages, most of which appear large enough to allow travel. Like lightning, you stab a feral dragonet BRUTALLY with your dagger. (29) A feral dragonet looks almost ready to expire. The power of the ocean strengthens, and you feel the swiftness of a moderate tide coursing through your veins.

npcs.name: Feral dragonet
npcs.description: snout.  The dragonet's naescent wings flap wildly as it vainly attempts a breath of fire, creating instead only an annoying cloud of acrid smoke.

3606.name: Narrow Cave
3606.description: Damp, slickened walls of solid rock close inward, making for cramped passage through the mineral. Streaks of metal mark the surfaces, and bits of loose stone skitter down from the rough ceiling overhead. Openings to the south and northeast offer exit. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

3611.name: Twisting Caves
3611.description: You travel through a variety of twisting tunnels, most of which seem quite similar. Collected in the corners are bits of rock, some bearing streaks of metal. A noxious odor wafts through the passages. Although small, some look large enough to pass through.

3612.name: Twisting Caves
3612.description: You've stepped through a passage into a series of twisting tunnels, all of which appear quite similar. Bits of rock and stone collect in corners, some of which look to be slightly charred. From somewhere a noxious odor drifts through the passages, several of which appear large enough to pass through.

3613.name: Twisting Caves
3613.description: You amble along a series of twisting tunnels, all of which appear quite similar. Small bits of rock and stone collect in corners, most of which appear worthless although a few contain streaks of metal. From somewhere a noxious odor drifts through the passages, some of which look large enough to pass through.

3614.name: Narrow Cave
3614.description: You step between rows of abrasive stalagmites hanging from the ceiling of this narrow cave. Small openings lead in a multitude of directions, yet those large enough for passage lay to the east and to the north, from which an oddly shimmering mist appears to originate.

3615.name: Edge of a Mist-Filled Well
3615.description: Further passage through the caves here is rendered impossible by the preponderance of loosely piled rocks and solidly hanging stalagmite. Tiny creatures skitter along the passages, heard but not seen. At your feet here is a rough, round opening from which pours a thick white mist.
